special_mechanics.name: Melee Combat
special_mechanics.description: Billy can perform punch, kick, and jump kick attacks using A and B buttons simultaneously

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Billy can pick up and equip melee weapons (throwing knife, club, whip) and guns that replace previous weapons

special_mechanics.name: Health/Armor System
special_mechanics.description: Chicken drumstick power-up refills health; body armor reduces damage and protects from bullets

special_mechanics.name: Jeep Driving Stages
special_mechanics.description: Stages 4-5 involve driving through freeway with no health gauge; single collision loses a life. Famicom version has jeep health gauge, NES version does not

physics_values.note: NES version has narrower roads and higher difficulty than Famicom version

special_mechanics.name: Rail Shooting Stages
special_mechanics.description: Stages 2-7 use first-person rail shooting format, playable with standard controller or NES Zapper

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/Qualitative data only. No precise physics parameters (velocities, accelerations, gravity values) documented in available sources. Sources provide gameplay descriptions and difficulty comparisons between Famicom and NES versions but no quantitative movement mechanics data.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - The Adventures of Bayou Billy
Wikipedia - The Adventures of Bayou Billy
